title: olisia annua
intro: Olisia annua, also known as Sweet Annie or Chinese Chrysanthemum, is a perennial herb native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its medicinal properties attributed to its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Olisia annua include relief from fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Olisia annua include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
